purpose: Translate host-name-first requests back into files-driven governance judgments.

checks.reason: This note carries formal project rules and stable fact definitions.
The MOC links upstream notes and current status, but should not define new authority.
The status note summarizes progress and blockers rather than redefining the spec.
The canvas brief compresses relationships for display and discussion.
The Notion rules home acts as the canonical rules page for this fixture.
The board view is a derived planning surface and must not outrank its upstream rules.
The shared doc carries the canonical scope and acceptance language.
The dashboard aggregates upstream records and should not decide truth by itself.
The deck is for reporting and display, not for writing upstream rules.

tool_operation_non_goals: Create or edit an Obsidian Canvas layout
Edit a single Google Doc paragraph
